docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-16-2006 CONTINUED TO JUL-28-2006 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-17-2006 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF SANCTIONS ISSUED ON MAY 2, 2006 TO CLIFFORD A. CHANDLER, ESQ., IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE OR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. SANCTIONS ARE ORDERED VACATED. ORDER SIGNED. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LAURA MARTINEZ, CSR#11332. (212)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of Sanctions Against Clifoord A. Chanler, Esq. For Failure To Apear At The Order To Show Cause
Off Calendar Aug-17-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion for reconsideration of sanctions issued on May 2, 2006 to Clifford A. Chandler, Esq., in the amount of $200.00 is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Sanctions are ordered vacated. Order signed. Proceedings reported by: Laura Martinez, CSR#11332. (212)
